testcase.name: adminAnalyticsEndpointsReturnRevenueBookingAndUserBreakdowns
testcase.system-out:
17:53:21.790 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.amrit.futsal.api.AdminAnalyticsIntegrationTest]: AdminAnalyticsIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 17:53:22.011 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.amrit.futsal.FustsalApplication for test class com.amrit.futsal.api.AdminAnalyticsIntegrationTest

Found 9 JPA repository interfaces. 2026-04-28T17:53:26.372+05:45 INFO 23032 --- [ main] o.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper : HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: default] 2026-04-28T17:53:26.554+05:45 INFO 23032 --- [ main] org.hibernate.Version : HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 6.6.2.Final 2026-04-28T17:53:26.654+05:45 INFO 23032 --- [ main] o.h.c.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator : HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 2026-04-28T17:53:27.392+05:45 INFO 23032 --- [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2026-04-28T17:53:27.439+05:45 INFO 23032 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Starting... 2026-04-28T17:53:27.775+05:45 INFO 23032 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:testdb user=SA 2026-04-28T17:53:27.777+05:45 INFO 23032 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-04-28T17:53:27.812+05:45 WARN 23032 --- [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-04-28T17:53:27.855+05:45 INFO 23032 --- [ main] org.hibernate.orm.connections.pooling : HHH10001005: Database info: Database JDBC URL [Connecting through datasource 'HikariDataSource (HikariPool-1)'] Database driver: undefined/unknown Database version: 2.2.224 Autocommit mode: undefined/unknown Isolation level: undefined/unknown Minimum pool size: undefined/unknown Maximum pool size: undefined/unknown 2026-04-28T17:53:29.298+05:45 INFO 23032 --- [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists bookings cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists futsal_companies cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists futsal_grounds cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists open_match_participants cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists open_matches cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists payments cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists reports cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists reviews cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists time_slots cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table bookings (booking_date timestamp(6) not null, ground_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, slot_id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, status enum ('CANCELLED','COMPLETED','CONFIRMED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table futsal_companies (created_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, owner_id uuid not null, location varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table futsal_grounds (price_per_hour numeric(38,2) not null, created_at timestamp(6), company_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, image_url varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null unique, surface_type varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table open_match_participants (open_match_id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, primary key (open_match_id, user_id)) Hibernate: create table open_matches (desired_player_count integer not null, created_at timestamp(6), booking_id uuid not null unique, host_user_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, title varchar(120) not null, notes varchar(500), skill_level enum ('ANY','CASUAL','COMPETITIVE','INTERMEDIATE') not null, status enum ('CANCELLED','FULL','OPEN') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table payments (amount numeric(38,2) not null, booking_id uuid not null unique, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, transaction_id varchar(255) unique, payment_status enum ('FAILED','PENDING','REFUNDED','SUCCESS') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table reports (end_date timestamp(6), generated_at timestamp(6), start_date timestamp(6), id uuid not null, owner_id uuid not null, report_data TEXT, report_type enum ('BOOKINGS','CUSTOMERS','REVENUE') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table reviews (rating integer not null, created_at timestamp(6), ground_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, review_text varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table time_slots (is_booked boolean not null, end_time timestamp(6) not null, start_time timestamp(6) not null, version bigint, ground_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table users (created_at timestamp(6), id uuid not null, email varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null, password_hash varchar(255) not null, phone_number varchar(255) unique, role enum ('ADMIN','OWNER','USER') not null, primary key (id), unique (email)) Hibernate: alter table if exists bookings add constraint FKl7od5giyvkdk2mmcdyn17mk47 foreign key (ground_id) references futsal_grounds Hibernate: alter table if exists bookings add constraint FKpgdi5yxmoykxuiqiu6460bfs4 foreign key (slot_id) references time_slots Hibernate: alter table if exists bookings add constraint FKeyog2oic85xg7hsu2je2lx3s6 foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists futsal_companies add constraint FKivhqcsbkyn3rvlon68nfktdon foreign key (owner_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists futsal_grounds add constraint FK6gxargjiek4itcdqj30b89boh foreign key (company_id) references futsal_companies Hibernate: alter table if exists open_match_participants add constraint FKpfaekm2i1s7lot0qnma5ca3g4 foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists open_match_participants add constraint FKsf3r9hhws0sa8odhgwsne7uqi foreign key (open_match_id) references open_matches Hibernate: alter table if exists open_matches add constraint FKk7jjc8n01580voe7w72lvqqbr foreign key (booking_id) references bookings Hibernate: alter table if exists open_matches add constraint FKif6896fqqc4lmqcemc3cfvpct foreign key (host_user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists payments add constraint FKc52o2b1jkxttngufqp3t7jr3h foreign key (booking_id) references bookings Hibernate: alter table if exists payments add constraint FKj94hgy9v5fw1munb90tar2eje foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists reports add constraint FKkv9jna7htxa2xcpsr2aih1hqc foreign key (owner_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists reviews add constraint FK2cjplwxfx83o9b6ufj5v6xwtr foreign key (ground_id) references futsal_grounds Hibernate: alter table if exists reviews add constraint FKcgy7qjc1r99dp117y9en6lxye foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists time_slots add constraint FKen9r45mxv2q247vmrew32ujxv foreign key (ground_id) references futsal_grounds 2026-04-28T17:53:29.401+05:45 INFO 23032 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-04-28T17:53:30.249+05:45 INFO 23032 --- [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser
